theme.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss Boldness)
theme.description: Bold & creative yet warm & approachable. Balances warm earthy tones (Terracotta/Sand) with confident cool tones (Deep Slate/Steel Blue) to reflect 'Empathy + Intelligence'. Uses editorial serif typography to convey authority and modern sans-serif for clarity.

layout.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6, p-12, py-24, py-32 for section breathing room.
layout.grid_system: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric bento grids for features. Avoid generic 50/50 splits without visual offset.
layout.borders: sharp edges or minimal rounding (rounded-md max) to maintain a mature, editorial look. No overly bubbly shapes.

header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/70 border-b border-[#0D1321]/10
header.rules: Must have visible navigation links on desktop. No hamburger menu on desktop.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C8553D] text-[#FDFBF7] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg hover:bg-[#A64430]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0D1321] text-[#0D1321] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:bg-[#0D1321] hover:text-[#FDFBF7]

forms.style: Use Shadcn customized components. Inputs should have bg-transparent, border-b only (material-style) or sharp square borders focus:ring-[#C8553D].

motion.hover_states: Buttons and cards lift up (-translate-y-1). Image containers apply slight scale (scale-105) on inner image.
motion.page_load: Fade up text staggers. Use Framer Motion for section entrances.

image_urls.description: Professional woman holding a microphone, used as the main hero image representing Shivani.
Woman in colorful sari speaking, showcasing authentic self and diverse leadership on stage.
Woman gesturing while talking to two people, representing 1-on-1 and team mentoring workshops.
Vibrant warm orange abstract art canvas with textured layers. Use as background for the 'Quote / Testimonials' section with dark text overlay.

page_sections.name: Hero
page_sections.content: Name (Shivani Verma), Tagline (Leadership Consultant & Keynote Speaker), Photo.
page_sections.layout: Asymmetric split. Left: Massive serif H1. Right: Image masking or overlapping offset container.

page_sections.name: My Message
page_sections.layout: Editorial text block with extreme negative space. Include a large typographic pull-quote.

page_sections.name: Background
page_sections.layout: Bento Grid (Mode A) or visual timeline showing distinct career phases.

page_sections.name: Speaking Engagements
page_sections.content: Topics ('How to get a seat...', 'Authentic self').
page_sections.layout: Cards with hover preview images. Sharp borders.

page_sections.name: Mentoring & Training
page_sections.layout: Split layout bridging visual imagery and bulleted outcomes.

page_sections.name: Quote / Testimonial
page_sections.layout: Full width banner using the 'background_texture_quote' image with highly readable, massive overlay text.

page_sections.name: Contact
page_sections.content: Simple contact form + 'Book a Call' CTA.
page_sections.layout: Clean Shadcn form on a dark tertiary background (#0D1321) with inverse text to create a dramatic anchor for the page footer.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags (div, section, span) with Tailwind for complex/overlapping layouts, and Shadcn components for interactive logic (forms, inputs).
Never center text by default. Emphasize asymmetric balance and strong left-alignments.
Do NOT use pure Inter or standard generic sans-serif for headings. Stick to Playfair Display for headings and Manrope for body text.
Implement fluid typography for headings. Ensure max scaling prevents H1s from breaking viewport bounds.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-book-call-btn').
Apply generous padding (p-12, py-24, gap-12). Leave empty columns in grids to create 'breathing room' and artistic tension.
Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile devices to prevent excessive scrolling.
Use the provided image_urls. Do NOT use placeholder domains like via.placeholder.com.
